name: Render Simple TOP
description: The Render Simple TOP renders a single POP with a basic transform, light and an optional texture map or material. Other controls include orthographic/perspective, object color and background RGBA. The camera is located along the Z-axis. The Normalize Geo parameter will translate and uniformly scale the POP geometry to fit in a box of size 2 in at the origin. You can render in wireframe or substitute the material with any MAT. The POP's render/display flags are ignored. Render Simple does not require a [[Camera COMP]], [[Geometry COMP]] or [[Light COMP]] that is required by the more full-featured [[Render TOP]]. See also [[Render TOP]]

parameters.name: Orthographic
parameters.label: Orthographic
parameters.description: Enable this to make the project become orthograhic instead of perspective.

parameters.name: FOV
parameters.label: FOV
parameters.description: The horizontal FOV in degrees, when using perspective projection.

parameters.name: Ortho Width
parameters.label: Ortho Width
parameters.description: The orthographic width, when using orthographic projection.

parameters.name: Camera Distance
parameters.label: Camera Distance
parameters.description: The distance along the Z-axis the camera is placed at. Similar to the Translate Z of a Camera COMP.

parameters.name: Normalize Geo
parameters.label: Normalize Geo
parameters.description: Translate and uniformly scale the POP geometry to fit in a cube of size 2 at the origin.

parameters.name: Background Color
parameters.label: Background Color
parameters.description: The background color to place behind the rendered geometry. Note that this is always pre-multiplied by the alpha, so set the alpha to 1.0 to get a non-transparent background.

parameters.name: POP
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: The path to a single POP to render.

parameters.name: Geometry Translate
parameters.label: Geometry Translate
parameters.description: Translate the geometry relative to it's original position.

parameters.name: Geometry Rotate
parameters.label: Geometry Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the geometry relative to it's original position.

parameters.name: Geometry Scale
parameters.label: Geometry Scale
parameters.description: Apply a uniform scale to the geometry relative to it's original position.

parameters.name: Light Translate
parameters.label: Light Translate
parameters.description: Translate the single point light that is applied to this render in world space.

parameters.name: Material Source
parameters.label: Material Source
parameters.description: Select where the material that is applied to this POP comes from, some internal parameters, or a MAT node.

parameters.name: Wireframe
parameters.label: Wireframe
parameters.description: When a Internal Phong is used, this turns on it's wire-frame mode.

parameters.name: Constant
parameters.label: Constant
parameters.description: Contant color value for the Internal Phong Mode.

parameters.name: Diffuse
parameters.label: Diffuse
parameters.description: Diffuse Color for the Internal Phong Mode.

parameters.name: Color Map
parameters.label: Color Map
parameters.description: A TOP that will be used for the 'Color Map' for the Internal Phong Mode.

parameters.name: MAT
parameters.label: MAT
parameters.description: A MAT node to use as the material, instead of the Internal Phong.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live Render_Simple_TOP wiki page
